description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The upholstery is a solid, light gray fabric that appears smooth and tightly fitted over the frame. The sofa has two seat cushions and two back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. The armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and positioned at the corners, with a subtle metallic or dark finish that contrasts with the upholstery. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and short, tapered legs. Its minimalist design and smooth upholstery make it suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows two uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical, boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the straight, broad armrest and the sofa's compact depth, with the backrest and seat cushions aligned.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, smooth back panel and the placement of the short legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's overall compact profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two uniform seat cushions and two uniform back cushions, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered legs positioned at the corners, with a dark or metallic finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and a continuous, unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
